summary.technicalChecklist: release gate command `pnpm release:check` passed end-to-end after aligning web E2E gateway contracts with observability interface requirements
summary.legalChecklist: compliance evidence chain validated for consent, export/delete and access-control audits through V4 P0 and V4 P1 artifacts
summary.operationsChecklist: observability, runbooks, audit trail and load/degradation evidence validated with active alerts/runbook linkage under stress
blockingIssuesResolved: web E2E in-memory gateways now implement listStructuredLogs/listActivityLog/exportForensicAudit required by ObservabilityGateway

commands: for file in docs/validation/V4_P0_T2_COMPLIANCE_LEGAL_DATA.json docs/validation/V4_P0_T3_ENTERPRISE_ACCESS_CONTROL.json docs/validation/V4_P1_T1_UNIFIED_TELEMETRY.json docs/validation/V4_P1_T2_ALERTING_RUNBOOKS.json docs/validation/V4_P1_T3_LOGGING_AUDIT_TRAIL.json docs/validation/V4_P2_T1_FRONTEND_PERFORMANCE.json docs/validation/V4_P2_T2_BACKEND_API_PERFORMANCE.json docs/validation/V4_P2_T3_LOAD_DEGRADATION.json; do test -f "$file"; done
